function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request as written. I found the canonical Family Map Wall project record, but I could not find any canonical project record for an “attic rainwater rig,” so I can’t determine whether it started earlier. Also, “Delete the earliest project” is ambiguous without a uniquely identified target, so I did not delete anything.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed process-next-inbox-item workflow; used canonical project lane records; applied deletion-and-wiping rule requiring uniquely supported deletion targets; per inbox rules did not mutate workspace when blocked on missing/ambiguous canonical support.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION because required canonical data is missing/ambiguous: no canonical 40_projects record was found for 'attic rainwater rig' despite searches, and the deletion instruction does not uniquely identify one project to remove.
